heading: Background
body:
Haystack is a framework for building custom applications with
LLM (Large Language Model)s, embedding models, and vector search.
By integrating MongoDB Vector Search with Haystack, you can use
MongoDB as a vector database and use MongoDB Vector Search to
implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) by retrieving semantically similar documents
from your data. To learn more about RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation),
see [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](ai-key-concepts).
